narrative:
Precinct Yorkville Village (precinct in Belmont County) has 272 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.7 percentage points.
